discharge_obligations.role: identify the time interval on which the restricted-continuation energy is evaluated
supply a representative or weak-time-regular payload for the energy functional
justify that the energy may be differentiated or used in the declared weak derivative sense
prevent the time-regular-energy assumption from being marked discharged until the analytic payload is proved or certified

positive: Records the time-regular-energy discharge lemma target after the regularity-and-differentiation discharge target.
Separates time-domain declaration, time-regular representative, derivative admissibility, and ledger-update guarding.
Makes explicit that the next regularity blocker is spatial regularity for integration by parts.
negative: Does not prove existence of a time-regular representative.
Does not prove energy derivative admissibility.
Does not discharge the regularity-and-differentiation assumption group.
Does not prove the formal restricted-continuation theorem.
Does not close the full RR theorem.
